title: Smoky Kielbasa Bites
description: Light and flavorful Smoky Kielbasa Bites featuring Polish sausage, fermented vegetables, and a touch of smokiness. Perfect for quick weeknight meals.
instructions: Slice the Kielbasa Sausage into bite-sized pieces.
Place the Kielbasa slices on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Drizzle the slices with olive oil, salt, and pepper. Roast in oven for 15 minutes or until golden brown.
Meanwhile, dice the red bell pepper and onion.
Sauté the diced ingredients in a pan until softened but not browned.
Add sliced fermented black olives to the sautéed vegetables and mix well.
Garnish each Kielbasa piece with the vegetable mixture before serving.
